reviews.review_msg: Really good professor who understands the material extremely well. Lectures are well put together so there is no need for a textbook. He tests you specifically on what he teaches, but don't expect it to be easy. One of the best classes I've taken including both my undergrad and masters degree.
Awesome teacher.  If you have questions after class, he is available to clarify it for you.  Well organized lectures with a witty tone.
